metadata.purpose: Ovality/out-of-roundness traceability data. Extracted lookup rows are used by app.py when standards.json declares ovality_tolerance.mode = lookup_table; derived and excluded standards are documented here for completeness.
rules: Values are extracted from workbook value cells, not recalculated from hidden formulas at runtime.
For rows with OD max/min, limit_mm is OD max - OD min.
For ASTM thin-wall rules, formula metadata is preserved per row.
No interpolation is performed by the app; closest nominal/table entry matching follows the selected standard entry.
Entries with mode excluded or diameter_tolerance_range are documented here, but the app evaluates them from standards.json because they do not require separate lookup rows.

1.formula: limit_mm = selected allowed max_diameter_mm - selected allowed min_diameter_mm
1.source_text: Workbook row Ovalitet/Epäpyöreys is calculated as selected max diameter minus selected min diameter. EN 10217-7 Punkt/kohta 8.8.4.5, D>406.4 independent ovality tolerance 2% not considered.
1.note: No separate ovality lookup rows are needed. The app follows the workbook displayed ovality value from the selected diameter tolerance range; it does not apply the separate D>406.4 2% ovality rule.

2.formula: limit_mm = selected allowed max_diameter_mm - selected allowed min_diameter_mm
2.source_text: Workbook row Ovalitet/Epäpyöreys is calculated as selected max diameter minus selected min diameter. EN 10217-7 Punkt/kohta 8.8.4.5, D>406.4 independent ovality tolerance 2% not considered.
2.note: No separate ovality lookup rows are needed. The app follows the workbook displayed ovality value from the selected diameter tolerance range; it does not apply the separate D>406.4 2% ovality rule.

3.note: ASTM A999/A928 ovality formulas depend on selected wall thickness schedule when available.

3.1.note: A1016 uses conditional wall-ratio formula; A358 uses extracted Dia. Avv lookup as out-of-roundness limit.

4.formula: limit_mm = selected allowed max_diameter_mm - selected allowed min_diameter_mm
4.source_text: Epäpyöreys/Ovalitet follows selected diameter tolerance range in the source sheet.
4.note: No separate ovality lookup rows are needed. The app derives the ovality limit from the diameter tolerance range selected from standards.json.
